'''''Agony's Child''''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warship/Legends|warship]]. It was destroyed during the [[Battle of Ithor]] due to fire from a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' {{1st}}
